mapper.sql: t.id, t.approval_record_id, t.approval_id, t.node_no, t.approve_type, t.approver_id, t.approver_role, t.approve_comment, t.attachment_url, t.operate_time, t.timeout_flag, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_approval_record t WHERE t.approval_id = #{approvalId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_approval_record t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_approval_record t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.approval_id = #{params.approvalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_approval_record ( approval_record_id, approval_id, node_no, approve_type, approver_id, approver_role, approve_comment, attachment_url, operate_time, timeout_flag, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{approvalRecordId}, #{approvalId}, #{nodeNo}, #{approveType}, #{approverId}, #{approverRole}, #{approveComment}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{operateTime}, #{timeoutFlag}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_approval_record ( approval_record_id, approval_id, node_no, approve_type, approver_id, approver_role, approve_comment, attachment_url, operate_time, timeout_flag, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.approvalRecordId}, #{item.approvalId}, #{item.nodeNo}, #{item.approveType}, #{item.approverId}, #{item.approverRole}, #{item.approveComment}, #{item.attachmentUrl}, #{item.operateTime}, #{item.timeoutFlag}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_approval_record t SET
t.approve_comment = #{approveComment},
t.attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl},
t.timeout_flag = #{timeoutFlag},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_approval_record t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
